prompt: 5-second cinematic 3D animated smoke test only. @img1 and @img2 (Aisha and Dora) stand calmly in the @img3 referenced location. CAMERA LOCK: Super slow, deliberate dolly push-in over 5 seconds, using an 85mm prime lens with very shallow depth of field, focused on Aisha's thoughtful expression. The camera subtly re-frames, ending on a medium close-up, subjects framed by architectural elements. WIDE SHOT at start, ends on a MEDIUM CLOSE UP. LIGHTING: Warm, golden hour backlight from the upper right, casting long, soft shadows. Soft key light gently illuminates their faces. Subtle rim light highlights their hair and shoulders. Volumetric dust motes dance in the ambient light, creating a dreamy, luminous atmosphere. SUBJECT MOTION: Aisha and Dora exhibit subtle, natural breathing. Their clothing fabric gently sways with an imperceptible breeze. Aisha's hair moves softly. Their expressions are serene and contemplative. Luminous family animated movie style, 16:9 aspect ratio, no text, no subtitles. Subsurface scattering, volumetric lighting, cinematic color grading, AAA quality 3D animation.
